comment: OPTIONAL pipeline for alternative asset packs. The game works FULLY with its own PixelLab assets included in the repo (packages/client/public/assets/); this manifest is NOT required to run it. To replace assets with external packs, download zip files from each 'page' URL into downloads/<id>.zip and run `npm run assets`. Raw files from these packs are NOT committed (some, for example Tiny Swords/CraftPix, prohibit asset redistribution); they only go into downloads/ (gitignored).

packs.name: Tiny Swords
packs.author: Pixel Frog
packs.license: Custom free - commercial and private use OK, modifications OK, redistribution/resale of assets prohibited
packs.role: Fantasy core: animated units (Warrior, Lancer, Archer, Monk, Pawn with work animations), castle, barracks, towers, terrain, water, UI

packs.name: Lucifer — Sorceress
packs.author: FoozleCC
packs.role: Fantasy mages: 4 directions x 10 animations (idle, walk, casting)

packs.name: Wyrmsun CC0 (900+ items)
packs.author: Wyrmsun community
packs.role: Fallback fantasy buildings: forge, mine, town hall

packs.name: Sci-Fi Strategy Mech Buildings Isometric
packs.author: acdrnx
packs.attribution: Sci-Fi Strategy Mech Buildings - acdrnx (optional, CC0)
packs.role: Sci-fi core (isometric): terrain, 8 animated buildings, 6 units

packs.name: Free Drones Pack
packs.author: CraftPix (free-game-assets)
packs.license: CraftPix free - commercial use OK, redistribution of raw files prohibited

packs.name: Free Lunar Battle Pack
packs.author: MattWalkden
packs.role: Lunar terrain (recolored for Mars), base structures
